{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"HTMX inline editing for todo titles (US-8 enhancement)","description":"US-8 says "HTMX enhances: inline editing without page navigation." Currently edit navigates to /todos/{id}/edit. Enhance with HTMX: clicking edit swaps the todo item with an inline edit form (hx-get), saving swaps back (hx-post). Focus management: entering edit mode focuses input; saving/canceling returns focus to item.

Driver: Carson Gross (HTMX expertise)
TDD: Write test, implement, verify green, commit+push, CI green, get 9/9 consensus.","assignedBy":"carson-gross","timestamp":"2026-02-08T22:41:19.127Z"}
</teammate-message>

content.text: Duplicate assignment for Task #5 as well -- already completed, committed (be0e44a), pushed, CI green. Waiting on 9/9 reviewer consensus.
